problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: If Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
